ns0:entry.ns0:title: DigitalPlatDev/FreeDomain
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DigitalPlatDev/FreeDomain
Language: html
DigitalPlat FreeDomain: Free Domain For Everyone

ns0:entry.ns0:title: S3DFX-CYBER/GSoC-Org-Finder-
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/S3DFX-CYBER/GSoC-Org-Finder-
Language: html
Find your perfect GSoC 2026 organization- filter all 184 selected orgs by your tech stack, language, and domain. No install needed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Sjj1024/PakePlus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Sjj1024/PakePlus
Language: html
Turn any webpage/HTML/Vue/React and so on into desktop and mobile app under 5M with easy in few minutes. 轻松将任意网站/HTML/Vue/React等项目构建为轻量级(小于5M)多端桌面应用和手机应用仅需几分钟. https://ppofficial.netlify.app

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Ylianst/MeshCentral
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Ylianst/MeshCentral
Language: html
A complete web-based remote monitoring and management web site. Once setup you can install agents and perform remote desktop session to devices on the local network or over the Internet.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: adongwanai/AgentGuide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/adongwanai/AgentGuide
Language: html
https://adongwanai.github.io/AgentGuide | AI Agent开发指南 | LangGraph实战 | 高级RAG | 转行大模型 | 大模型面试 | 算法工程师 | 面试题库 | 强化学习｜数据合成

ns0:entry.ns0:title: averygan/reclip
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/averygan/reclip
Language: html
Download videos from almost any website. Lightweight, self-hosted media downloader with a clean web UI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: htr-tech/zphisher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/htr-tech/zphisher
Language: html
An automated phishing tool with 30+ templates. This Tool is made for educational purpose only ! Author will not be responsible for any misuse of this toolkit !

ns0:entry.ns0:title: revfactory/harness
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/revfactory/harness
Language: html
A meta-skill that designs domain-specific agent teams, defines specialized agents, and generates the skills they use.
